essence: Supports chemical analysis, process monitoring, and laboratory operations in industrial and research settings.

identity.title: Chemical Technician
identity.summary: Prepares samples, runs analytical instruments, and supports process control and R&D activities under supervision.

salary.notes: Specialist analytical skills and process experience increase earning potential.

qualifications: Qualification in chemistry or laboratory techniques
Experience with analytical instruments (GC, HPLC, spectrometry)
Good laboratory practice and safety awareness
Ability to follow SOPs and record data accurately

lifestyle.description: Laboratory or plant environment with routine analysis, sample prep, and adherence to safety and quality systems.

habits: Records results and follows QA procedures
